title: Demo - Mart on the Lower Town Street

approval.notes: Authored demo conversation for D-002 wiring; replace with slice dialogue after P1-011.

deterministic_offline.notes: Linear two-way exchange for the minimal demo dialogue box.

nodes.text: Master, the street is awake tonight. If the Black Cloaks move now, we will not get another chance.
The street is awake because people still have work to finish. Put your heat in the forge, not in slogans.
The forge will not free anyone if we keep tempering fear instead of steel.
Then prove you can hold a line of iron before you talk about holding a line at the gate.

source_notes.summary: Short two-way demo beat between Kalev and Mart on the Lower Town slice.
